# GoViral Ads

> Growth and performance marketing agency building complete customer acquisition systems across Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, and AI search. Based in the United States. No long-term contracts: clients see results before committing to an agency relationship.

GoViral Ads runs three core offers: the Google Ads Proof Program (first month $600), the Meta Growth Proof Program (first month $800), and SEO Autopilot (AI-assisted SEO, $500/month). All engagements are month-to-month, no lock-in contracts. Founder is Akshat Singh.

## Services

- [Google Ads Proof Program](https://goviralads.agency/google-ads): Google Ads account audit, rebuild, and management. First month $600.
- [Google Ads Management in Salt Lake City, Utah](https://goviralads.agency/salt-lake-city-google-ads-agency): Google Ads Proof Program for Salt Lake City, Orem, Provo and Utah businesses. First month $600.
- [Meta Growth Proof Program](https://goviralads.agency/meta-ads): Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads rebuild and management. First month $800.
- [SEO Autopilot](https://goviralads.agency/seo-autopilot): Ongoing AI-assisted SEO and AI-search optimization. $500/month after setup.
- [Services overview](https://goviralads.agency/services)
- [Growth Playbook](https://goviralads.agency/growth-playbook)

- [About](https://goviralads.agency/about): Founder background and agency positioning.

## Articles

- [PPC Management vs. PPC Agency: What's Actually the Difference](https://goviralads.agency/ppc-management-vs-ppc-agency): The real scope difference between buying execution work and hiring a full agency, and how to tell which one you're being sold.
- [Hiring a Google Ads Agency in the US in 2026](https://goviralads.agency/google-ads-agency-us-2026): What changed in AI bidding, conversion tracking, and how to vet an agency.
- [Hiring a Meta Ads Agency in the US in 2026](https://goviralads.agency/meta-ads-agency-us-2026): Why creative now decides more than targeting, and what to ask about tracking.
- [Hiring an SEO Agency in the US in 2026](https://goviralads.agency/seo-agency-us-2026): Why AI answer engines changed the evaluation, and how to spot a rebrand vs real capability.
- [The Death of Traditional SEO](https://goviralads.agency/death-of-traditional-seo)
- [Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)](https://goviralads.agency/answer-engine-optimization-aeo)
